candidates.title: Menu Design for a Brew cafe
candidates.brief: Menu Design for a Brew cafe We're looking for a graphic designer to create a menu for our cafe. Small project to start, but we're open to ongoing work with the right person. What we need: Full café menu (food + drinks) Print-ready files Editable InDesign source files upon completion Our style: Warm, cozy, and elevated. Clean layouts, intentional typography, nothing generic or template-heavy. Requirements: Proficiency in Adobe InDesign Strong sense of typography, layout, and print design Experience with café, restaurant, or hospitality brands preferred When applying, please include: Portfolio examples from food, beverage, or hospitality projects Brief intro about your background Estimated timeline and rate To confirm you've read this post in full, please start your proposal with the word "Brew". Open the Upwork search this task was found in

candidates.title: Uber Eats Growth & Optimisation Specialist
candidates.brief: About Us Poles Patisserie is an award-winning family-owned bakery based in Western Sydney, Australia. We are known for our premium pies, pastries, cakes, and baked goods, with a strong local following and a growing online and delivery presence. As we continue to grow, we're looking for an experienced Uber Eats / food delivery platform specialist who can help us maximise our performance on Uber Eats and turn our store into a high-converting, professionally optimised sales channel. The Project We believe there is significant untapped potential within our Uber Eats account, and we're looking for someone who knows the platform inside and out. We want our Uber Eats store to look incredible, perform exceptionally well, and generate as many sales as possible. We're looking for an expert who can review our current setup and provide recommendations, implementation support, and ongoing optimisatio

candidates.title: UX/UI Designer for Hospitality SaaS
candidates.brief: I'm looking for an experienced UI/UX designer to help create a clickable Figma prototype for a hospitality software concept. The product is aimed at independent cafes, bakeries, coffee shops, takeaways and small restaurants. The concept is a modern "kitchen companion" that helps operators manage menu items, ingredients, allergens and food costing in a simpler and more intuitive way than traditional hospitality back-office systems. This is NOT a development project. The goal is to create a prototype that can be shown to hospitality operators to validate the concept before any software is built. What I'm Looking For - UX/UI Designer with strong SaaS experience - Experience designing mobile and desktop workflows - Strong product thinking and user-flow design - Figma wireframing and prototyping - Someone who can challenge assumptions and improve the workflow, not just create screens The prod
